chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 1555 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.04.2025. Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Gul Naz Firdeous, Advocate for Respondents Nos. 5 to 7. Mr. Zulifqar Ali Naich, AAG. *********** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, therefore, he does not wish to press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
